description:
Goal
Add Compiler-owned APIs for source/frontend checking and execution-graph preparation so `lib.rs`, REPL helpers, and test support stop stitching those stages together ad hoc.

Signal
- `Compiler` owns the production path from source or parsed program input to `PreparedExecutionGraph`.
- Existing CLI and test callers use those APIs instead of manually calling `compile_source_with_types`, `checked_module_for_mode`, and `prepare_execution_graph` in sequence.
- Tests pin the new Compiler surface and preserve existing telemetry behavior.

Strategy
- Expand `src/compiler.rs` into a focused driver facade.
- Keep pass ownership in `frontend` and `modules::pipeline`; only move sequencing/orchestration.
- Land tests first, then switch callers.
title: Compiler spine: move frontend and execution-graph driving into Compiler
